violations.description: Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Flour on the walls, floors, and fir extinguisher was not cleaned up immediately.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item * was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. - Food in the freezer stored on the floor.
Food-contact surfaces - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface * was not disassembled for proper cleaning. - REPEAT - Soda fountain has green bacterial growth on the dispensing unit.
